I'm building a Flutter app for streaming and downloading movies and TV shows. My goal is to create something similar in functionality to GoMovies or Free Netflix – primarily focused on user experience and downloading. Crucially, I need this project to be built ethically and legally. I'm not looking for assistance in acquiring or distributing copyrighted content. I understand and prioritize respecting copyright laws and terms of service. I need you to guide me on the technical aspects, focusing on how to implement the desired features within a legal and responsible framework.
